channel.title: Maine Legislature Schedule of Public Hearings and Work Sessions
channel.description: Index page links to client-rendered (AJAX) hearing schedules; monitored by full-page fingerprint as a safety net. Structured per-hearing extraction lives in leg-hearings-schedule, which POSTs to the underlying JSON endpoint (a plain GET to it returns only a stale dump of 1990s sessions).

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Legislature Schedule of Public Hearings and Work Sessions
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
